args.query:
SELECT replace(trim(op.OwnerId),'#','') AS AgentId,
       AVG(date_diff('day', DATE(op.CreatedDate), DATE(c.CompanySignedDate))) AS avg_days
FROM Opportunity op
JOIN Contract c ON replace(trim(op.ContractID__c),'#','') = replace(trim(c.Id),'#','')
WHERE DATE(op.CreatedDate) >= DATE('2023-04-01') AND DATE(op.CreatedDate) < DATE('2023-05-01')
  AND c.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY AgentId
ORDER BY avg_days ASC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT replace(trim(op.OwnerId),'#','') AS AgentId,
       AVG(date_diff('day', DATE(op.CreatedDate), DATE(c.CompanySignedDate))) AS avg_days
FROM Opportunity op
JOIN Contract c ON replace(trim(op.ContractID__c),'#','') = replace(trim(c.Id),'#','')
WHERE DATE(op.CreatedDate) >= DATE('2023-04-01') AND DATE(op.CreatedDate) < DATE('2023-05-01')
  AND c.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY AgentId
ORDER BY avg_days ASC
LIMIT 1;
